case_title: IMEN KAMMOON VS. BIADA INVESTMENT LLC DOING BUSINESS AS FAYALA

docket_entries.description: (SC-150) REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL GRANTED FILED BY PLAINTIFF KAMMOON, IMEN AS TO DEFENDANT BIADA INVESTMENT LLC DOING BUSINESS AS FAYALA
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF KAMMOON, IMEN ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT BIADA INVESTMENT LLC DOING BUSINESS AS FAYALA
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF KAMMOON, IMEN

DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY FETEN KAMEL AS ARABIC INTERPRETER. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY IMEN KAMMOON, OWNER, AND WAIVES SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM FILED BY KAMMOON, IMEN BIADA INVESTMENT LLC DOING BUSINESS AS FAYALA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-31-2018 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO SEP-07-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506
ORDER RE: DISMISSAL (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,530.00 FILED BY KAMMOON, IMEN AS TO DEFENDANT BIADA INVESTMENT LLC DOING BUSINESS AS FAYALA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-31-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
